events.title: Sounds from Beyond: A Multidimensional Voice Journey
events.description:
Enter. Feel. Remember.

Guided by Mysticlio's unique multi-dimensional vocal transmission, participants are invited to simply lie down, relax, and receive. Drawing upon harmonic singing, overtone resonance, and intuitive vocal expression, the journey unfolds as a living transmission that gently guides listeners beyond the thinking mind and into deeper connection with themselves.

This experience creates a space where sound becomes a catalyst for transformation. The voice serves as a bridge between the conscious and subconscious realms, travelling within the physical, emotional, mental and spiritual dimensions of our being, allowing participants to access deeper states of clarity, grounded relaxation, emotional balance, and expanded awareness.

Each journey is unique and intuitively shaped by the energy of the group, creating a deeply personal yet collective experience. Participants often report feeling a renewed sense of connection, inner peace, emotional openness, and alignment with their authentic essence.

ABOUT THE ARTIST

Mysticlio is a Vocal Alchemist, Sound Healer, artist, and transformational facilitator who has spent the past decade exploring the relationship between voice, consciousness, emotional liberation, and human potential.

Through his signature methodology, Vocal Alchemy, he guides individuals and groups on immersive journeys that weave together vocal expression, sound healing, embodiment, meditation, and emotional integration. His work uses the human voice as a powerful catalyst for self-discovery, authentic expression, healing, and inner transformation.

Having facilitated workshops, retreats, private sessions, sound journeys, and live performances internationally, Mysticlio has supported hundreds of people in reconnecting with their authentic voice, overcoming self-expression barriers, and cultivating greater confidence, presence, and emotional freedom.

As a performer, he creates deeply immersive vocal experiences that blend harmonic singing, overtone resonance, intuitive improvisation, and contemporary sacred sound, inviting audiences into profound states of presence, connection, and remembrance.

events.title: Journey through the Chakras: Voice & Crystal Bowl Sound Ceremony
events.description:
Journey through the Chakras brings together crystal singing bowls, shamanic instruments, and a live operatically trained voice into an experience unlike other sound healings. You are guided through each chakra, invited to stay present, breathe consciously, and work with the sound rather than simply receive it.

The combination of crystal bowl frequencies and operatic overtones creates optimal conditions for the nervous system to drop into theta, the brainwave state linked to deep meditation, emotional processing, intuition, and healing.

Camila Rivera studied up to Master's level in Opera and brings almost a decade of somatic and trauma-informed practice to her facilitation. The result is a ceremony that exists at the intersection of artistic mastery and deep intuitive healing.

ABOUT THE ARTIST

Camila Rivera is a sound healer and voice coach based in Bali, holding a Master's degree in Opera Performance and almost a decade of somatic and trauma-informed practice. Her Sound Healing Ceremony combines crystal singing bowls, shamanic instruments, and a live operatic voice into an active, guided journey through the chakras, something rare in the world of sound healing. Rather than passive relaxation, participants are guided to stay present, breathe, and move with the sound as it works through the body. Camila works with individuals, couples, and groups in Bali and online worldwide, and has facilitated at festivals and retreats across Europe and Southeast Asia.

events.title: Lulu & Mischka, Kirtan & Heart Song Concert
events.description: LOVEFEST presents Lulu & Mischka live in Bali as the festival’s Saturday headliners. Lulu & Mischka are an Australian husband-and-wife musical duo best known for creating devotional mantra and heart-centred music inspired by yoga and bhakti traditions. They combine Sanskrit mantras, English lyrics, acoustic folk, world music and rich vocal harmonies to create concerts designed as participatory experiences rather than conventional performances. Their music invites the audience to become part of the concert, to listen, sing, soften and connect, moving between meditative stillness, heartfelt devotion and joyful collective celebration. Fresh from their European tour, Lulu & Mischka will bring a powerful community gathering to LOVEFEST at Moana Wellness Hub, just steps from Bali’s beautiful west coast. Join this immersive evening of singing meditations, community chanting and kirtan.

events.title: Grief in Motion: Moving What the Body Holds
events.description:
Grief in Motion: Moving What the Body Holds

Grief is not something to fix, but something to feel, honor, and move. Many of us carry unprocessed grief from heartbreak, endings, change, unmet needs, or the weight of being human. When held inside, grief can become numbness, anxiety, or disconnection.

This workshop offers a grounded space to explore grief through movement, breath, sound, and somatic expression. Through guided practices, evocative music, and communal witnessing, we soften, release, reconnect, and remember. Where grief becomes movement, and movement becomes prayer.

Grief is not something to fix -it is something to feel, honor, and move.

So many of us carry unprocessed grief within the body: grief from endings, heartbreak, transitions, unmet needs, loss of identity, or the collective weight of being human. When grief is suppressed, it can manifest as numbness, anxiety, disconnection, or emotional stagnation.

This workshop offers a gentle and powerful space to meet grief through movement, breath, sound, and somatic expression. Together, we will explore how the body naturally wants to release, soften, tremble, and transform when given permission and safety.

Through guided practices, evocative music, and communal witnessing, participants are invited to reconnect to their emotional landscape and discover the medicine that lives within honest expression.

This is a space for tenderness, humanity and remembrance. Where grief becomes movement, and movement becomes prayer.

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Grief in Motion is a sacred exploration of movement, music, and embodied healing guided by Alana and Sophie Sôfrēē.

Alana’s path weaves together professional dance, yoga, somatics, trauma work, meditation, and hypnotherapy, creating spaces rooted in authenticity, playfulness, and transformation. She is also part of Amenti. Alongside her, Sophie brings her medicine as a DJ, musician, and facilitator known for crafting soulful journeys through rhythm, emotion, and connection.

Together, they offer a compassionate space where grief is welcomed, witnessed, and gently moved through the body toward deeper aliveness, remembrance, and liberation.

events.title: Mind Sound Resonance
events.description:
In the quiet corners of the body, unspoken stories live. Some as tension, some as fatigue, some as grief we’ve forgotten how to name. Through the layers of our being, beyond muscle and breath, rests the subtle body, the Manomaya Kosha, where the mind and memory meet. In this session, we invite you to enter that space, held by the ancient science of vibration.

Through the repetition of sacred sound, both aloud and inward, this practice initiates resonance that reaches into cellular memory. These are not mere mantras; they are vibrational keys that gently unlock the places we have guarded, consciously or not.

Why come to this space?

Because you’ve felt that tension in your chest that never quite leaves.

Because you crave a form of release that doesn’t require words or effort.

Because trauma, whether deep or recent, doesn’t always speak in language, it speaks in vibration.

What MSRT offers:

• A safe space to meet the unresolved: within the resonance of sound, the nervous system is cradled in safety.

• Deep parasympathetic activation: calming the flood of cortisol and bringing the body back to rest and digest.

• Subtle unwinding of trauma: without having to relive, explain, or analyze, just feel and allow.

• Gentle reclamation of inner space: as the mental waves settle, clarity and grounded presence return.

It is a space to remember yourself whole. To feel the ancient medicine of sound wash through your body like a soft tide, dissolving, releasing, renewing.

Who is this for?

For the ones who hold much and speak little.

For those who feel ready to meet themselves beyond story.

For any soul called to heal through sound, stillness, and grace.

Please come as you are.

Wear something you can breathe in. Bring water, bring softness, bring nothing at all. Just come.

You will leave lighter. Not because you’ve fixed anything, but because you’ve listened.

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Anand Dhandapani is a Yoga Master, naturopath and founder of Samudra Yoga Space with over 15 years of experience guiding others through the deeper paths of healing. Rooted in the wisdom of Vedanta and Ayurveda, his work blends ancient philosophy with practical embodiment. Anand holds a diploma in Naturopathy and channels a rare presence, steady, humble and deeply intuitive. His guidance invites you to remember. In silence, sound and stillness, he offers a space where the sacred becomes tangible and the self is met, fully and gently.

events.title: The Art of Sound Healing
events.description:
The long journey of Agustian Supriatna took him to navigate through different cultures and ancient traditions around the globe. Always curious and thirsty for understanding through direct experience and experimentation.

The Art of Sound Healing condenses the various teachings he has been picking up for years, ready to be shared. It is an alluring music experience that takes the audience to the inner healing journey with ancient Sanskrit mantras, Sufi chanting, Javanese and Sundanese traditional lullabies. While using these sacred scriptures, he composes the music with his own voice and colours. Agustian surprises with new sounds and a variety of music instruments such as bansuri (Indian bamboo flute), suling (Sundanese bamboo flute), karinding (Sundanese bamboo jaw harp), tabla (Indian drum), gambus (Sumatrans oud), ngoni (west African harp), Tibetan singing bowls and so on. He is constantly searching for new instruments or even making and adapting them himself. In concert, he will delight everyone with his magical voice and music while leading other amazing musicians who join him in this journey.

He has found that music is the best media to channel his heritage as a healer as well as sharing his art and heart, to everyone open and willing to dive into themselves.

events.title: Heart Opening Sound Bath
events.description:
Join Sound Healer and Reiki Master Natania for this Heart Opening Sound Bath. Discover the deep healing and resonance of the Crystal Alchemy Singing Bowls. Each bowl is made with 99.9% clear quartz crystal, that is combined with different gemstones, crystals, metals and/ or earth minerals. Each bowl is unique, bringing the healing effects of sound, as well as the alchemies within each bowl.

Experience a deeply soothing and relaxing sound bath and Reiki healing, and feel energetic blockages softly dissipate, a clearing and aligning of your chakras, and deep cell regeneration. Leave this sound bath with your heart chakra opened, ready to live you life leading from the heart, and leading with love, every step of the way.

ABOUT THE ARTIST

Natania Setyadi is a Jakarta-based sound healer and reiki master who shares the magic of the crystal alchemy singing bowls in both group and private sound baths. She currently serves as a mentor at The Sound Healer’s Academy, a Los Angeles-based sound healing training, where she is helping to train up and coming sound healers. She is also known as a multidisciplinarian, being an astrologer, human design reader, and conscious business coach, as well as a sound and energy healer.

events.title: The Art of Transformational Sleep: A 25-HR Yoga Nidra Immersion
events.description:
Are you seeking deep relaxation and a renewed sense of well-being?

Join me for a transformative 3-day immersion in the profound practice of Yoga Nidra.

What to expect

 
 Twice-Daily Guided Yoga Nidra Sessions: Experience the profound benefits firsthand with morning and evening sessions, each exploring a unique theme to address specific needs and intentions.

 
 
 Theoretical Foundations: Uncover the science and wisdom behind Yoga Nidra, learning how it works and why it's so effective for stress relief, sleep enhancement, and emotional well-being.

 
 
 Practical Techniques: Learn simple yet powerful tools to incorporate Yoga Nidra into your daily routine for lasting transformation.

 
 
 25-Hour CE Yoga Alliance Accreditation: Deepen your knowledge and skills while earning continuing education credits.

 

Session Themes

 
 Stress Relief: Release tension and cultivate a calm mind.

 
 
 Sleep Enhancement: Improve sleep quality and wake up feeling refreshed.

 
 
 Chakra Balancing: Harmonize your energy centers for optimal health and vitality.

 
 
 Inner Peace: Cultivate a deep sense of peace and tranquility.

 

About Emily Kuser

Emily Kuser is an experienced yoga teacher, founder of High Vibe Yoga, and passionate guide on the path of Yoga Nidra. With over 20 years of teaching experience, Emily brings warmth, wisdom, and expertise to create a safe and supportive space for your journey.

Who is this for?

This immersion is open to everyone, from beginners to experienced practitioners, including:

 
 Individuals seeking deep relaxation and stress relief

 
 
 Yoga teachers and therapists wanting to expand their offerings

 
 
 Anyone interested in exploring the transformative power of Yoga Nidra

 

Registration

Don't miss this opportunity to experience the profound benefits of Yoga Nidra and earn valuable continuing education credits. Register now and take the first step towards a more restful and rejuvenated you!

Emily Kuser comes from a family of explorers, artists, and writers. She has been practicing Yoga for over 20 years and teaching Yoga since 2006 in classes, workshops, retreats and yoga teacher trainings. Emily has been a senior member of The Yoga Barn in Ubud, Bali's teaching faculty since it’s opening in 2008.

In 2010, she founded High Vibe Yoga, one of Bali's first Yoga schools and offers 50-hour, 200-hour and 300-hour yoga trainings in specialized subjects.

events.title: Cacao, Connection and Sound Healing
events.description:
This evening brings together three practices that each work in the same direction. They open. They slow you down. They bring you home to yourself. Together they create something more than the sum of their parts.

We begin with ceremonial cacao. Locally sourced in Bali and shared in a quiet, intentional space, this traditional plant medicine is known to support emotional clarity and heart openness. It creates the conditions for everything that follows.

From there, Chris Walker guides the group through authentic relating. These are simple, structured practices that cultivate genuine presence and real human contact. Not therapy. Not performance. A set of relational tools that invite you to listen more deeply, speak more honestly, and connect more authentically. Whether you come alone or with someone you know, these practices meet you where you are.

As the collective energy begins to settle, we transition into sound healing. The sound bath closes the evening from the outside in, using vibration and resonance to help the body integrate what has been opened emotionally and relationally. You are invited to lie down, close your eyes, and simply receive.

The arc of the evening moves from opening to connecting to integrating. Each stage builds on the last. By the close, most people feel a quality of presence and ease that is rare in everyday life.

You do not need prior experience with cacao, authentic relating, or sound healing to attend. You need only to be willing to show up without an agenda.

What to bring: a yoga mat or something comfortable to lie on for the sound bath, a blanket if you tend to get cold, and comfortable clothes.

Space is limited.

 

ABOUT THE ARTIST

Chris Walker is an international yoga teacher, coach, and speaker based at The Yoga Barn in Ubud, Bali. A former engineer and tech sales leader, he left the corporate world in 2017 to dedicate his life to yoga. With over 3,000 classes taught and 60,000 students worldwide, he is Senior Faculty at The Yoga Barn and Faculty at Inner Dimension Yoga alongside Travis Eliot. Rooted in the lineage of Krishnamacharya with studies under Janet Stone, Bernie Clark, and Mark Whitwell, Chris teaches from lived experience rather than external form. His philosophy is simple: walk your way.

events.title: Bali Ciao & The 13 Moons
events.description:
Bali Ciao & The 13 Moons

A Film Screening & Art Exhibition by Stefano Rossetti

Saturday, June 27 • 7:30 PM

Screening of the film Bali Ciao and temporary exhibition of the artistic project “The 13 Moons”, featuring a selection of masks, wooden sculptures, and paintings created by Stefano Rossetti. An opportunity to explore, through cinema and art, stories and inspirations drawn from the culture and spirituality of Bali.

STEFANO ROSSETTI

Stefano Rossetti is an Italian artist, designer, and creative explorer whose work bridgesart, symbolism, community, and personal transformation.

For more than two decades, Stefano has been creating visual experiences that invitepeople to reconnect with wonder and playfulness through sculpture, immersive installations, masks, puppets, and symbolic imagery.

His artistic journey has taken him across the world, collaborating with local artisans to create works that honor both cultural heritage and contemporary expression.

Stefano creates large-scale participatory artworks and public installations that transformspaces into places of connection, inviting people of all ages to engage through curiosity, joy, and collective experience.

Today, much of his work is inspired by his travels, where he continues to explore the intersection of creativity, spirituality, ritual, and wellbeing.

BALI CIAO

Bali Ciao follows a journey both inward and outward into the heart of Bali. 

The island is far more than a backdrop: it becomes a living presence, a place to be explored, listened to, and questioned. 

Chapter by chapter, the protagonist is gradually drawn into the rituals, gestures, and contradictions of Balinese culture, allowing each encounter and experience to call hiscertainties into question and open up new reflections on the meaning of the journey, identity, and belonging. 

Blending documentary observation with narrative storytelling, the film traces a path of discovery in which the journey gradually becomes immersion, confrontation, and transformation. 

Bali Ciao is not only a portrait of a place, but also a reflection on the way a place can reshape the gaze of those who pass through it.

events.title: Essence Alchemy: create self-love blends
events.description:
Embark on a transformative journey of self-discovery and healing in our workshop designed to help you consciously connect with your emotions and intuition while creating a personalized self-love blend using natural essences. This unique experience is rooted in the principles of aromatherapy, where you will explore a variety of scents that resonate deeply with your individual emotional landscape.

Throughout the workshop, you will engage in guided discussions and activities that facilitate a deeper understanding of how scents can influence your mood, feelings, and overall well-being. You will discover benefits of essential oils, gaining insight into how each aroma carries its own unique properties that can support various aspects of emotional health.

As you delve into this aromatic adventure, you will be encouraged to reflect on your current emotional state and intuition, allowing you to select the essences that best align with your personal journey. With hands-on blending sessions, you will step into the role of alchemist, crafting a face-body oil tailored specifically to your needs, desires, and intentions. This blend is more than just an oil; it symbolizes your commitment to self-love and self-care.

It will also incorporate mindfulness practices, guided meditations, an Oracle of Essences reading and self-connection with chakras, fostering a holistic approach to well-being that promotes deep self-awareness. By the end of the experience, not only will you walk away with a beautiful, personalized oil, but you will also carry with you newfound tools for nurturing your emotional well-being. Join us for this enriching workshop and take this empowering step toward embracing self-love and healing through the art of aromatherapy and intuitive creation.

Please bring a pen, use whatever makes you comfortable as we will be working sitting on cushions on the floor, and bring what you need to stay hydrated. We're waiting for you with excitement to explore something new!

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Founded in 2018 by visionary Carla Benites on the magical island of Bali, Love Pure emerged from a deep personal journey of self-discovery. Driven by her passion for exploring the intricate relationship between emotions and the effects of plant essences, Carla sought to create a brand that invites people to embrace their authentic selves and receive the pure energy of nature.

Carla believes that by identifying and releasing repressed emotions we can discover the path to personal freedom and inner peace.

Love Pure embodies a deep reverence for the earth. We harness the power of natural ingredients, ensuring each product resonates with purity and intention. Love Pure is more than just a brand; is a movement that encourages people to nourish their hearts and souls while honoring the planet.

events.title: Awaken To Self Love Immersion
events.description:
This workshop is specially designed for women who are seeking a deeper understanding and appreciation of themselves. 🌺

Embark on a journey of self-discovery and learn to love yourself fully and unconditionally.

Through a series of mindfulness exercises, guided meditations, rituals, writing and many other techniques and practices you will connect with your inner self and become more aware of your emotions, thoughts, and behaviors. 🌈

Let go of negative self-talk and self-limiting beliefs, and embrace self-affirming thoughts and behaviors.

Embrace your strengths and weaknesses, accepting yourself as you are, and cultivate a greater sense of self-compassion and self-love. 💕

You will also gain practical tools and techniques for self-care and self-nurturing. Develop your own self-care routines and make self-love and self-nurturing a daily practice. 🌸

This workshop is a powerful and life-changing experience, offering liberation from self-doubt, self-criticism, and negative self-talk.

Connect with like-minded women on a similar journey and receive the support and encouragement you need. 🌟

By the end of the workshop, you will emerge feeling more confident, empowered, and connected to your true self.

Experience a greater sense of self-worth and self-love, enabling you to live a more fulfilling and authentic life. 🌻

Don't miss this opportunity to awaken your self-love.

1.⁠ ⁠Inner Child Work: Healing and connecting with the inner child to address past wounds and promote emotional healing.

2.⁠ Self-Soothing Practices: Techniques to comfort and calm oneself during times of stress or emotional distress.

3.⁠ ⁠Breathing Practices: Various breathing techniques for relaxation, stress relief, and mindfulness.

4.⁠ ⁠Writing Practices: Journaling prompts and exercises for self-reflection and expression.

5.⁠ ⁠Releasing Practices: Methods for letting go of negative emotions, past traumas, and limiting beliefs.

6.⁠ ⁠Morning and Evening Rituals: Establishing daily rituals for starting and ending the day with intention and mindfulness.

7.⁠ ⁠Sleep Hygiene: Practices and habits that promote good quality sleep.

8.⁠ ⁠Shame Releasing Practice: Techniques for identifying, understanding, and releasing feelings of shame.

9.⁠ ⁠Emotional Freedom Techniques (EFT): A practice that combines tapping on acupressure points with focused attention on specific thoughts or emotions to release them.

10.⁠ ⁠Feeling Feelings: Encouraging the acknowledgment and acceptance of one's emotions without judgment.

events.title: The Face of Feminine
events.description:
This ritual journey maps archetypal feminine expressions as distinct nervous system states — safety, protection, openness, desire, authority, devotion, and intuition. Each archetype is explored through both its resourced light and its shadow: the parts of ourselves we have hidden, suppressed, or not yet claimed.

Drawing on somatic psychology, neuroscience and the wisdom of sacred movement traditions, each arc of the workshop includes: somatic grounding and nervous system regulation, embodied movement and sacred dance, guided inquiry into the archetype's light and shadow, relational practices and optional small-group sharing, and take-home somatic practices for continued integration.

Working with the archetypes supports emotional integration, self-trust, clearer boundaries, mature intimacy, and authentic leadership — not as concepts, but as lived body experiences. Participants leave with a richer inner map of their own feminine complexity and greater capacity to inhabit the full range of who they are. Emphasis throughout is on felt experience over performance, and on the power of sisterhood held in the space.

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Carolina Zavala is a somatic facilitator, embodiment guide, and movement practitioner with training in somatic psychology, neuroscience, and Tantric-inspired embodiment. Her work sits at the intersection of nervous system science and the wisdom of the body, weaving somatic practice, authentic relating, and mindful movement to support deeper self-connection, emotional regulation, and embodied presence. She facilitates workshops internationally, offering spaces that are safe, inclusive, and deeply nourishing for all bodies and experience levels.

events.title: Tribal Fusion Dance Intensive with MARIAMA DEL MAR July
events.description:
Tribal Fusion Dance Intensive with MARIAMA DEL MAR

The initial format is a 3-day intensive with 1.5-hour daily classes, ending with a short choreography performance.

This intensive is open level (no strict prior experience required — participants with different movement backgrounds are welcome). You will focus on developing a deeper language of movement to integrate into everyday life.

The work is structured through five layers:

— visual perception and observation

— embodiment through imitation and repetition

— technique (isolations, illusions, slides, core Tribal Fusion vocabulary)

— energetic states (exploring qualities such as softness, precision, instinct, fluidity, stillness)

— narrative layer, where choreography is learned through imagery and inner storytelling

Through this process, you will develop: 

— deeper body awareness and control 

— expanded movement vocabulary 

— ability to express emotions and inner states through dance 

— presence and confidence in movement 

— final embodied choreography performance

Mariama will integrate archetypal dimensions of movement, so dance becomes not only a skill, but a lived, embodied experience. The goal of these intensives is to expand body awareness, deepen expressive range, and develop the ability to embody different emotional and energetic states through movement.

Open level | 3 days

1.5h classes

Final choreography performance

Price: 1,500,000 IDR per person

events.title: Going Beyond Methods
events.description:
Join Zach for a lively, open, and grounded discussion on Going Beyond Methods.

We have the privilege of accessing thousands of methods for personal and spiritual development right at our fingertips. Many of us have tasted one or many of them, and yet, we continue to seek, search, and look for the perfect one. With so many methods available to us, it’s often confusing to know when we have found a method worth sticking with and when we need to move on. 

With the abundance of methods available to us, it’s easy to get caught in Spiritual Materialism, Spiritual Bypassing, and the Absolute. It feels good to connect with The Absolute. It feels good to have found a method or practice that works for us. And yet, it’s easy to fall into rigid ethnocentric ways of thinking that suggest our practice or method is the best for everyone. 

Going Beyond Methods presents a new opportunity. 

Going Beyond Methods presents us with a practical and fresh perspective that transcends and includes the complex levels of waking up, growing up, and cleaning up. It offers an integrative and powerful approach moving forward.

Schedule: 

11:00 - 11:15 am = Gentle Stretching + Guided Zen Meditation 

11:15 - 11:45 am = Going Beyond Methods Discussion 

11:45 am - 12:00 pm = Journaling and Sharing 

12:00 - 12:15 pm = Conclusion and Tips Moving Forward

If you feel called to integrate, deepen, and simplify your learnings, teachings, and methods on the spiritual path, I invite you to join us in supportive and open dialogue. If you are tired of seeking, gaining, and extracting from the various methods and want to participate in the pendulum shift back to sanity, groundedness, and presence, I invite you to join us.  

“The realized person is the most natural, the most ordinary. He has no methods, no techniques.” 

Nisargadatta Maharaj

events.title: Essence Alchemy: create self-love blends
events.description:
Embark on a transformative journey of self-discovery and healing in our workshop designed to help you consciously connect with your emotions and intuition while creating a personalized self-love blend using natural essences. This unique experience is rooted in the principles of aromatherapy, where you will explore a variety of scents that resonate deeply with your individual emotional landscape.

Throughout the workshop, you will engage in guided discussions and activities that facilitate a deeper understanding of how scents can influence your mood, feelings, and overall well-being. You will discover benefits of essential oils, gaining insight into how each aroma carries its own unique properties that can support various aspects of emotional health.

As you delve into this aromatic adventure, you will be encouraged to reflect on your current emotional state and intuition, allowing you to select the essences that best align with your personal journey. With hands-on blending sessions, you will step into the role of alchemist, crafting a face-body oil tailored specifically to your needs, desires, and intentions. This blend is more than just an oil; it symbolizes your commitment to self-love and self-care.

It will also incorporate mindfulness practices, guided meditations, an Oracle of Essences reading and self-connection with chakras, fostering a holistic approach to well-being that promotes deep self-awareness. By the end of the experience, not only will you walk away with a beautiful, personalized oil, but you will also carry with you newfound tools for nurturing your emotional well-being. Join us for this enriching workshop and take this empowering step toward embracing self-love and healing through the art of aromatherapy and intuitive creation.

Please bring a pen, use whatever makes you comfortable as we will be working sitting on cushions on the floor, and bring what you need to stay hydrated. We're waiting for you with excitement to explore something new!

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Founded in 2018 by visionary Carla Benites on the magical island of Bali, Love Pure emerged from a deep personal journey of self-discovery. Driven by her passion for exploring the intricate relationship between emotions and the effects of plant essences, Carla sought to create a brand that invites people to embrace their authentic selves and receive the pure energy of nature.

Carla believes that by identifying and releasing repressed emotions we can discover the path to personal freedom and inner peace.

Love Pure embodies a deep reverence for the earth. We harness the power of natural ingredients, ensuring each product resonates with purity and intention. Love Pure is more than just a brand; is a movement that encourages people to nourish their hearts and souls while honoring the planet.

events.description:
🌕 Full Moon Gathering: Cacao Ceremony, Ecstatic Dance, Sound Journey & Fire Ritual  ✨

Join us for a special evening of intention, movement, ceremony, and connection under the Full Moon in Ubud.

This gathering is more than an Ecstatic Dance event. It is a carefully held journey through ceremonial cacao, embodied movement, fire ritual, and sound — created to bring people together in presence, expression, and community.

We will begin with a ceremonial cacao circle to gently open the heart and set our intentions for the evening. From there, we move into an ecstatic dance journey — a space for free expression, release, and embodied connection.

As the night deepens, we will gather around the fire for a closing fire ritual with a sound journey, creating space to reflect, let go, and integrate the experience beneath the night sky.

This is not about performance, steps, or how it looks from the outside. It is about feeling the music, listening to the body, releasing what no longer serves, and allowing yourself to be fully present in the moment.

✨ What to expect:

• A heart-opening ceremonial cacao circle

• Intention setting under the Full Moon

• An open ecstatic dance journey

• Music, movement, and embodied expression

• A beautiful fire ritual beneath the night sky

• A grounding sound journey for integration

• A safe and welcoming space to move freely

• Connection with yourself, others, and the energy of the Full Moon

Whether you are an experienced dancer, new to conscious movement, or simply feel called to gather in ceremony, this evening is an invitation to come as you are.

No steps to follow.

No performance.

No expectations.

Just you, the cacao, the music, the fire, the sound, the moon, and the energy of the room.

Come as you are. Move from the heart. Gather under the Full Moon. 🌕

events.title: Supermoon A Conscious Full Moon Gathering  x  The Yogabarn
events.description:
SUPERMOON A Conscious Full Moon Gathering 🌕 X The Yogabarn Ubud Saturday June 27th  

📍 The Yogabarn, Ubud

Doors open at 3pm - 11pm 

  

Supermoon is Bali’s most anticipated full moon gathering. Since Mt Agung erupted in 2017, we have gathered and celebrated together as a community. In each gathering, people from all over the world have had life changing experiences on the dance floor while musicians have found their freedom to express and connect deeper on the unique stage that we built. 

SUPERMOON Suara Semesta  is dedicated to bringing people together through the universal spiritual language of music. This gathering serves as a testament to our collective responsibility to support and elevate local Indonesian artists who enrich our community with their unique expressions and cultural heritage.

We recognize that art forms the binding core of our community—it is not merely entertainment but the essential thread that weaves our diverse experiences into a unified tapestry. By celebrating these artists, we acknowledge their vital contribution to our collective consciousness and honor the wisdom they bring to our gathering.

This is not an act of charity but an affirmation of our interconnectedness. The exchange between artist and audience creates a sacred circle of reciprocity that strengthens us all. As we dance under the full moon, we commit to nurturing this artistic ecosystem that sustains the cultural vibrancy of Bali and Indonesia.

Join us in honoring the power of local artistic expression as we move, breathe, and celebrate as one community bound by sound, rhythm, and shared intention.

Raw, borderless, we will be reunited to melt our longings into a new way. Infusing our intentions as the sublime texture of music circulates through our bodies and enlivens our hearts. Unleash your spirit, express your gifts, and dance to the sacred rhythm of life.

MAIN STAGE (SUARA SEMESTA)

3:00PM - 6:00PM Acro Yoga, Capoeira & Movement Jam 

6:00PM - 7:00PM  Opening Concert with Edoardo x Kimundo

7:15PM - 8:45PM  Batik Boy (Global Sounds Dance Party)

8:45PM - 10.15PM Prabumi (Ecstatic Dance Party)  

10:15PM - 11.00PM Sonic Savasana with Nayyamul  

TEA HOUSE STAGE

TBA

  

VISIONARY ART & LIVE PAINTING

TEA HOUSE EXHIBITION  (Tea service from 6:00pm)  

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

The full moon lunar phase represents the end of inhalation, the completion and expansion of prana (energy). The new and full moons create polar energies; physical and mental energy is strongest when the moon is full. We are preparing 2 stages for this special occasion.

VENUE

The Yoga Barn is a tropical oasis, an epicenter of self-discovery, healing and renewal tucked into the heart of downtown Ubud. A welcoming and naturally built environment, the Yoga Barn invites all who enter the grounds to connect within and to experience life differently; the Yoga Barn’s pace is intrinsically led by Balinese culture, and is blessed by the Hindu and animistic traditions of Bali, embodying the healing medicine of Ubud. Allowing guests the opportunity to heal, to gather and grow in community; to connect to Self and to open up towards inner transformation. In short, The Yoga Barn contains a special energy and has an uplifting pulse that can be felt throughout its grounds, a perfect venue for the Supermoon.

More Artists TBA

 

•••

••• 

ONLINE PRESALES:

 

350K IDR Presale 1

450K IDR Presale 2

550K IDR At the door

  This is a family friendly event, kids and local Indonesian caretakers enter for free.  

  

  

ARTIST PROFILE:  

  

PRABUMI

Prabumi is a collaborative effort initiated by Muktito Adhitya, an electronic music producer and musician. He began his career at a young age, composing music as early as 7 years old. Over time, Muktito became increasingly drawn to exploring life through travel and immersion in nature. He developed a deep fascination and appreciation for the sounds of nature and felt compelled to preserve them through the medium of music, harnessing the harmonious melodies and harmonies they offer. Prabumi represents one of Muktito's most recent explorations into music, incorporating the sounds of nature, traditional world music instruments, and the earth itself. Guided by his passion and intuition, Muktito has masterfully fused these organic elements into a rich tapestry of dynamic music imbued with the beauty of nature's own symphonies.

Prabumi is also a movement that uses music as its medium, responding to the sounds of nature, world and domestic traditional music instruments, and earth sounds. The name 'Prabumi' can be interpreted as a state before man as it is today. A long time ago, human beings were one without classification of race, ethnicity, nationality, or state. In essence, Prabumi is a movement that aims to reunite and remind people that we are one, we are the same, with no exceptions, equal beings, through music.

Prabumi has played on various festival stages around the world alongside renowned acts such as Be Svendsen, Barrio Lindo, Stavroz, Viken Arman, Richie Hawtin, Nicola Cruz, Akimbo, Xique-Xique, Timboletti, Spaniol, Matanza, Amuamu, and many more.

Link :   

https://soundcloud.com/prabumi  

https://www.instagram.com/nadaprabumi/  

https://prabumi.bandcamp.com  

https://open.spotify.com/artist/57QlhqqFzN2V6xEjkctD64  

https://www.mixcloud.com/OMTTO/  

https://web.facebook.com/nadaprabumi?_rdc=1&_rdr  

 

BATIK BOY

Born and raised in Indonesia, BATIK BOY spent his teenage years in The Netherlands. There, he immersed himself in the diverse and thriving music scene, inspiring him to explore the limitless possibilities of music.

Since 2016 he has been back in his home country of Indonesia, living on the island of Bali, where he decided to establish Batik Boy Radio, a unique platform

that serves as a reflection of his broad musical palette.

He sees music as a universal language that transcends borders and brings people together, where his music selections are a testament to his global perspective, where he blends Afrobeats, Amapiano, 3step, Baile Funk, Latin Rhythms, and more – music sets with soul.

With his infectious energy and passion for music, BATIK BOY continues to discover emerging artists, explore new sounds and push the boundaries of musical expression.

Whether he’s spinning tunes at live events, sharing mixes on his radio platform, or collaborating with fellow musicians, BATIK BOY’s unwavering dedication to the art form resonates deeply with his audience and leaves a memorable mark on the music scene.

events.title: Integrated Kundalini Awakening (IKA)
events.description:
Integrated Kundalini Awakening – A Life-Altering Energy Transmission

During this event, you'll receive a direct energy transmission, awakening your Kundalini Shakti – the latent, divine, and healing energy within every individual. This awakening triggers a remarkable rewiring of your brain and central nervous system, leading to profound emotional and spiritual healing, often unattainable through other means.

As the raw Kundalini life force awakens and surges through your spine, you'll embark on a path to uncover your truest, most powerful, and divine self. This energy purges stored blockages within your energy system, guiding you toward transcendence and elevating your consciousness. It's a journey of rebirth, love, and surrender.

What Can You Expect During a Session? Lie down on a comfortable mat as soothing music plays in the background. The facilitator may gently touch or press certain chakras and meridian points on your body or use hand movements above you. Internally, a wide range of experiences may unfold, from spontaneous movements and emotional release to vivid lights, visuals, and a sense of bliss. Many describe it as a purifying experience, offering deep insights and realizations that lead to physical, mental, energetic, and emotional release. It's a transformative journey beyond the reach of mere words.

Kundalini energy clears accumulated blockages in your energy system, promotes the development of all energy centers, brings clarity and self-understanding to life, restores inner strength and self-confidence, increases energy potential, which leads to financial expansion, enhances sexuality, cultivates a state of happiness, and promotes harmony and tranquility. After a certain number of sessions you will feel more alive and orgasmic.

IMPORTANT: This is not Kundalini yoga session and meditation. This is a life force energy awakening where you can experience strong emotional or physical release, an energetic shift or a visual download. Get ready for a transformative journey.

Before the Session:

 
 Arrive a few minutes early to get settled.

 
 
 Wear loose, comfortable clothing, avoiding clothing with metal zippers or snaps down the front.

 
 
 Consider eating lightly or not at all before the session; an empty stomach is ideal, but a light snack such as fruit is acceptable.

 
 
 If you consume meat, try to refrain from it in the days leading up to the session.

 
 
 Avoid coffee, alcohol, or other substances prior to the class.

 

 
 This session can only be joined by adults 16+

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Anna Sohana has dedicated her life to helping others awaken their inner potential and activate the Divine within themselves.

Her grounded and embodied approach to spiritual practices allows everyone to dive deeply into self-discovery and personal transformation.

Anna has been practicing many forms of Holistic Healing for over 20 years. She is a Certified Yoga Teacher, Body Therapist, Musically Trained Sound Healing Practitioner, Breathwork Facilitator, Certified Astrologer and Facilitator of Integrated Kundalini Awakening (IKA).

Anna offers shamanic ceremonies, groups, private sessions and education. Her global mission is to change people's understanding of their relationship with themselves and the world around them, to enable them to create a life based on their fundamental needs for joy and freedom.

events.title: Shiva & Shakti: The Sacred Dance of the Known and Unknown
events.description:
What if life's greatest invitation is not to seek certainty, but to learn how to dance with the unknown?

In the yogic tradition, Shiva and Shakti represent two essential forces within us: awareness and movement, stillness and transformation, structure and freedom. Together, they remind us that growth does not arise from clinging to what is familiar or abandoning all form, but from learning to move gracefully between both.

Through storytelling, reflection, and guided Sircle movement practices inspired by Shiva as Nataraja, the Lord of the Cosmic Dance, this workshop explores dance as a form of yoga—a pathway to presence, self-discovery, and transformation.

While much of today's embodiment culture emphasizes free expression, this journey reveals the sacred relationship between form and freedom. Participants will experience how intentional structure can become a container for authentic expression, cultivating greater trust, intuition, and resilience in times of change.

No dance experience is necessary—only a willingness to move, explore, and embrace the dance between the known and the unknown.

ABOUT THE TEACHER

Sejal S Sood is the visionary of Sircle. She has trained in Indian Classical dance for 18 yrs, but her true inspiration comes from folk dance & Yoga. Though formally trained in Mathematics from MIT, her passion for dance has led her to live and travel across Asia for the last 17 yrs. Having devoted many years integrating the mysteries and treasures of dance into a form that is relevant and accessible, she now creates art and spreads Sircle dance around the world. Sircle is her gift to the world, to help everyone connect to themselves, to each other, and to the vast world around us.

Refund Policy:

If you are unable to attend this event, you are eligible for a full refund of the ticket price if you contact us at least 24 hours in advance of the published start time. Contact must be made via email to bookings@theyogabarn.com  or in person at The Yoga Barn reception desk. We are NOT able to process refunds for any reason if you contact us less than 24 hours prior to the published start time.  We do not cover reimbursement of any associated booking fees that exceed our published ticket price.

Ticket Transfer:

Tickets are not transferrable to another person. The booking is only valid for the person whose name is printed on this ticket.

Late Arrival:

We recommend that you arrive 15 minutes prior to the start time. If you arrive after the published start time, you may be denied access and your booking will not be refunded.

Cancellation Policy:

If this event is canceled by The Yoga Barn prior to the start time, you are eligible for a refund of your ticket. We do not cover reimbursement of any associated booking fees that exceed our published ticket price. Please be aware that refunds may take up to 30 days.
